subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Be thou not grieved at what hath befallen Us. Verily, We have ordained whatsoever hath appeared in the Tablets. Indeed, thy Lord is over all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امتی لاتحزنی عما ورد علینا انا قد قضینا ما ظهر فی الالواح ان ربک علی کل
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort
